titleStmt.title: SII 30.188: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 188. (A.R. No. 264 of 1915.) Brahmadēsam, Cheyyar Taluk, North Arcot District Chandramauḷīśvara temple-on the north wall Rājēndra-Chōḻa I: year 27: 1039 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription commences with the praśasti of the king “t6irumanni-vaḷara” etc. It records the gift of money for nūlēru probably for sacred thread used for hoisting the flag on the beginning day of the festivals, by Miḷaimuḍaiyāṉ Pūvalān Arumoḻi a native of Puliyūr-nāḍu a subdivision of Arumoḻidēva-vaḻanāḍu in Soḻamaṇdalam for which a land was purchased by the temple of Pōndai uḍaiya mahādēva at Parākramasōḷa-chatūrvēdimaṇgalam and which was made tax-free by mahāsabhā. Another gift of gold (10(3/4) kaḻañju and 6 mañjāḍi) for a lamp by Umādēviyār, wife of Vallavaraiyar Vandyadēvār was also recorded. It mentions the water sources like Kundvaip-pērēri, Sundarasōḻap-pērēri, Paramēśvara-vāykkāl and Kīḻkōṭṭaiyūrvati while describing the boundaries.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumannivaḷara Irunila maṭantaiyum poṟceyappāvaiyum cīrttaṉic celviyum taṉperunteviyarāki Iṉpuṟa neṭutuyil Ūḻiyuḷiṭaituṟaināṭum tuṭarvaṉavelip paṭarvaṉavāciyum cuḷḷi cūḻmatiḷ koḷḷipākkaiyum naṇṇaṟkaru muraṇmaṇṇaik kaṭakkamum porukaṭalīḻattaraiyarta muṭiyum Āṅkavar teviyar Oṅkeḻil muṭiyum muṉṉavar pakkal teṉṉavaṉ vaitta cuṉtira muṭiyum Intiranāramum teṇṭirai Īḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatu Eṟipaṭai keraḷaṉ
muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭuṅkulataṉamākiya palarpukaḻ muṭiyum ceṅkatir mālaiyum caṅkatir velait tolperuṅkāval palpaḻantīvum ceruvil ciṉavi Irupattorukālaraicukaḷaikaṭṭa paraicirāmaṉ mel varuñcānti maṟṟīvaraṇ karuti Iruttiya cempoṟṟiruttaku muṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḷitta cīrciṅkaṉ Aḷapperum puka(ḻ)ḻoṭu piṭi Iraṭṭapāṭi Ē(ḻ)ḻarai Ilakkamum navanetiykulap peruma
laikaḷum vikkiramavīracakkarakkoṭṭamum muturaivaṭavallai maturai maṇṭalamum kāmiṭaivaḷaiya nāmaṇaikkoṇaiyum veñcilai vīra pañcappaḷḷiyum pācuṭaippaḻaṉa mācuṇitecamum Āyarvil vaṇkīrtti Ātinakaravaiyil cantiraṉ tolkulattantira tirataṉaiRead- intira rataṉaiviḷaiyamark kaḷattuk kiḷaiyoṭum piṭittu pala caṉattoṭu niṟaikulataṉak kūvaiRead- kuvaiyum kiṭṭarum ceṟimiḷai Oṭṭaviṣaiyamum pūcuracernal kocalai nāṭum taṉmapālaṉai vemmuṉai Aḻittu vaṇṭuṟaicolai taṇṭaputtiyum Iraṇacūraṉai muraṇukat tākki tikkaṇai kīr
tti takkaṇalāṭamum kovintacantaṉ māviḻintoṭa taṅkāta cāral vaṅkāḷatecamum toṭukaṭaṟ caṅku koṭaṭṭal makipālaṉai veñcama viḷākattañcuvittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟalyāṉaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum nittila neṭuṅkaṭal Uttiralāṭamum vaṟimalarttīrttattteṟipuṉal kaṅkaiyum Alaikaṭal naṭuvuṭ palakalañ celuttic caṅkirāma vicaiyottuṅka paṉmaṉākiya kiṭārattaraiyaṉai vākaiyam porukaṭal kumpak kariyoṭum Akappaṭutturimaiyil piṟakkip peruneti piṟakkamum Āttavarnakar porttoḻil vācalil viccātirat toraṇamum moyttoḷip puṉaimaṇipputavamum kanamaṇi
kkatavamum niṟaicīrvicaiyamum tuṟainīrppaṉṉaiyum paṉmalai Ūreyiṟ ṟoṉmalai Ūrum Āḻkaṭalakaḻcūḻ māyiruṭiṅkamum kalaṅkā valviṉai yilaṅkācopamum kāppuṟu niṟaipuṉal māppap pāḷamu(mu)ṅ kāvalam puricai mevilimpaṅkamum viḷaippantūṟuṭai vaḷaippantūṟum kalaittakkor pukaḻ talaittakkolamu tītamar valviṉai mātamāḷiṅkamum kalāmutir kaṭuntiṟal Ilāmutir tecamum tenekka vārpoḻil mānakkavāramum toṭukaṭalkāval kaṭumuraḷ kaṭāramum māpporu taṇṭāṟk koṇṭa kopparakecaripanmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīrājentira coḻa tevarkku yāṇṭu 2 10 7
Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu tāmarkoṭṭattut tāmarnāṭṭup parākkiramacoḻaccatuppetimaṅkalattu śrīpontaiyuṭaiya mahādevarkku coḻamaṇṭalattu Arumoḻitevavaḷanāṭṭu puliyūr nāṭṭu miḷaimuṭaiyāṉ pūvalāṉ Arumoḻi Ittevarkku nūleṟṟukku vaitta kācu 10 koṇṭu Ittevarkku nūleṟṟu sandi kku can=tirātittavaṟ Iṟaiyiṟukka vaitta bhūmi śrī(ri)kuntavai pereri kiḻ koṭṭaiyūr vatikku mekku paramesvaravākkālukku vaṭakku kaṇapati (tu) madhya(ha)staṉ keraḷāntaka kulottama
cūṟṟi paṉaṅkāṭaṉ pūmi kuḻi 150 meṟpaṭi Ērikiḻ meṟku paramecuvara vāykkālukku vaṭakku 1 kaṇṭattu kāḷattu niṉṟa caṉmaṉ bhūmi kuḻi 2 10- m śrīcuntaracoḻapereri kiḻ koṭṭaiyūr vatikkuk kiḻakku parameśvara vākkālukku vaṭakku 1 kaṇṭattu maṅkalattu virapattiraṉ bhūmi kuḻi 2 100 5 10 kuḻiyum Ākakkuḻi 6 100m cantirātittavaṟ Iṟaiyiṟuttuk kuṭuppomāṉom Ivvūr sabhaiyom kara Ūr 2 10 ṉāl Uṭaiyār vallavaraiyar vandyadevar nampirāṭṭiyār Umādevi
yār śrīpontai Uṭaiyār m(ā)hādevaṟku tirunantā viḷakkoṉṟinukku vaitta pon patiṉ mukkaḻaiñce Āṟu mañcāṭi Ippoṉ patiṉmukkaḻaiñce candrādittavaraiyum Erippatānom samvatsarantoṟuñ śrīkāriyañ ceyyum Ikoyil vāriyarom .
Digital edition of SII 30.188 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
